reference_images.label: ptero
reference_images.purpose: Ground the flying obstacle wing span and beak shape.

reference_images.label: style
reference_images.purpose: Ground the monochrome pixel-art outline and spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/chrome_dino_runner/trial_5/obstacles_pterodactyl_fly_2f_10fps.png with AssetServer during Loading state and keep the handle in a resource entry keyed by obstacles_pterodactyl_fly_2f_10fps.
runtime_notes: Apply nearest-neighbor sampling and integer-pixel transforms at runtime.
Keep the authored 1x pixel ratio and scale only by integer multiples in camera space.
Use a deterministic startup registration order so task execution order maps to asset registration order.
Drive frame changes from a repeating Timer component that advances atlas index values in FixedUpdate.

context.usage: Spawn after score 200 at low or high flight lanes and move left with two-frame wing beats.

shape.silhouette: Flying pterodactyl with long beak, angled crest, and wide wing span.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 184x80 px with 2 frames.
Animation playback runs at 10 fps with stable whole-pixel frame alignment and no anti-aliasing.
Visible pixels use only the hex colors listed in specs.colors_hex plus transparency.
